notes_for_human_reviewer: Structured; owners on every item; R1/R2 fully complete. Triggers inconsistent (R3/R4 missing). Some mitigations specific (R1, R2), others vague (R4 'Investigate'). Categories correctly applied. Single snapshot — floor on living-artifact. Two cells have tolerance 2: living_artifact_evidence (Claude ~1pt drift on borderline single-snapshot cases) and ownership_and_accountability (CONTENT-001 first CI run scored it 2 vs expected 4; the fixture has owners on R1–R4 but I/A/D sections are less uniform which Claude reads inconsistently).
